'''Kwevron''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]]. It was a lightly populated world, with almost of all of its people engaged in farming to provide food for neighboring [[Sector/Legends|sectors]]. An [[Imperial Prefect]] oversaw its [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Hills and fields covered most of its surface.<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

In [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]] a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] contact and farmer named [[Idu Taanfaar]] was discovered and killed by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] under the command of [[Falto Dragen]]. The Rebel recruiter [[Cala Worner]] escaped the world with the assistance of some bystanders, whom she brought into the Alliance.<ref name="Rebellion Era Sourcebook" />

{{Planet-stub}}
